2604.09470.title: Agentic Jackal: Live Execution and Semantic Value Grounding for Text-to-JQL
2604.09470.paper_summary: Translating natural language into Jira Query Language (JQL) requires resolving ambiguous field references, instance-specific categorical values, and complex Boolean predicates. Single-pass LLMs cannot discover which categorical values (e.g., component names or fix versions) actually exist in a given Jira instance, nor can they verify generated queries against a live data source, limiting accuracy on paraphrased or ambiguous requests. No open, execution-based benchmark exists for mapping natural language to JQL. We introduce Jackal, the first large-scale, execution-based text-to-JQL benchmark comprising 100,000 validated NL-JQL pairs on a live Jira instance with over 200,000 issues. To establish baselines on Jackal, we propose Agentic Jackal, a tool-augmented agent that equips LLMs with live query execution via the Jira MCP server and JiraAnchor, a semantic retrieval tool that resolves natural-language mentions of categorical values through embedding-based similarity search. Among 9 frontier LLMs evaluated, single-pass models average only 43.4% execution accuracy on short natural-language queries, highlighting that text-to-JQL remains an open challenge. The agentic approach improves 7 of 9 models, with a 9.0% relative gain on the most linguistically challenging variant; in a controlled ablation isolating JiraAnchor, categorical-value accuracy rises from 48.7% to 71.7%, with component-field accuracy jumping from 16.9% to 66.2%. Our analysis identifies inherent semantic ambiguities, such as issue-type disambiguation and text-field selection, as the dominant failure modes rather than value-resolution errors, pointing to concrete directions for future work. We publicly release the benchmark, all agent transcripts, and evaluation code to support reproducibility.
2604.09470.paper_summary_zh: 將自然語言翻譯成 Jira 查詢語言（JQL）需要解決模糊的字段引用、實例特定的類別值和複雜的布林謂詞。單次通過的 LLM 無法發現給定 Jira 實例中實際存在的類別值（例如，組件名稱或修復版本），也無法將生成的查詢與實時數據源進行驗證，這限制了對改述或模糊請求的準確性。沒有開放的基於執行的基準來映射自然語言到 JQL。我們介紹了 Jackal，第一個大規模的基於執行的文本到 JQL 基準，包含 100,000 對經過驗證的 NL-JQL 對，基於一個擁有超過 200,000 個問題的實時 Jira 實例。為了在 Jackal 上建立基準，我們提出了 Agentic Jackal，一個工具增強的代理，通過 Jira MCP 伺服器為 LLM 提供實時查詢執行，以及 JiraAnchor，一個語義檢索工具，通過基於嵌入的相似性搜索解決自然語言提及的類別值。在評估的 9 個前沿 LLM 中，單次通過模型在短自然語言查詢上的平均執行準確率僅為 43.4%，突顯了文本到 JQL 仍然是一個開放的挑戰。代理方法改善了 9 個模型中的 7 個，對於最具語言挑戰性的變體，相對增益為 9.0%；在一個控制性消融中，隔離 JiraAnchor，類別值的準確率從 48.7% 上升到 71.7%，組件字段的準確率從 16.9% 飆升至 66.2%。我們的分析確定了固有的語義模糊性，例如問題類型的消歧和文本字段的選擇，作為主要的失敗模式，而不是值解析錯誤，指向未來工作的具體方向。我們公開發布了基準、所有代理轉錄和評估代碼，以支持可重複性。
2604.09470.author: Vishnu Murali et.al.
2604.09470.authors: Vishnu Murali, Anmol Gulati, Elias Lumer, Kevin Frank, Sindy Campagna, Vamse Kumar Subbiah
